skymen_bounding_box.name: Bounding Box
skymen_bounding_box.description: Resizes the object to fit the bounding box of its children or a custom list of instances and layers

boundingBoxMode.name: Bounding Box Mode
boundingBoxMode.desc: The bounding box mode. Own children: only direct children. All children: The entire hierarchy. Custom list: only the children in the custom list.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether the bounding box is enabled.

AddLayerToCustomList.display-text: {my}: Add [b]{0}[/b] to custom list (include children: [i]{1}[/i], include sub layers: [i]{2}[/i])
AddLayerToCustomList.description: Add a layer to the custom list.

layer.name: Layer
layer.desc: The layer to add to the custom list.

includeChildren.name: Include Children
includeChildren.desc: Whether to include the children of the instances.

includeSubLayers.name: Include Sub Layers
includeSubLayers.desc: Whether to include the sub layers of the layer.

AddObjectToCustomList.description: Add an object to the custom list.

object.name: Object
object.desc: The object to add to the custom list.

includeChildren.name: Include Children
includeChildren.desc: Whether to include the children of the object.

RemoveFromList.description: Remove an object from the custom list.

object.name: Object
object.desc: The object to remove from the custom list.

RemoveLayerFromList.description: Remove a layer from the custom list.

layer.name: Layer
layer.desc: The layer to remove from the custom list.

SetEnabled.description: Set whether the bounding box is enabled.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether the bounding box is enabled.

IsEnabled.description: Check whether the bounding box is enabled.

Count.description: The number of objects in the bounding box.
